channel.title: NAF Howley, L O'Doherty, N McEniff, R O'Riordan | PlatCOVID

image.title: NAF Howley, L O'Doherty, N McEniff, R O'Riordan

item.title: Late presentation of 'Lemierre's syndrome': how a delay in seeking healthcare and reduced access to routine services resulted in widely disseminated Fusobacterium necrophorum infection during the global COVID-19 pandemic.
